title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.535 - Parking prohibited during certain hours on certain streets
text:
300.535.  Parking prohibited during certain hours on certain streets. — When signs are erected in each block giving notice thereof, no person shall park a vehicle between the hours specified by ordinance of any day except Sunday and public holidays within the district or upon any of the streets described by ordinance.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 137)
